description:
List issues using Sentry query syntax directly (no AI/LLM required).

Use this tool when:
- You know Sentry query syntax already
- AI-powered search is unavailable
- You want precise control over the query

Common Query Syntax:
- is:unresolved - Show unresolved issues only
- is:unassigned - Show unassigned issues
- level:error - Filter by error level
- firstSeen:-24h - First seen in last 24 hours
- lastSeen:-1h - Last seen in last hour
- has:user - Issues with user context
- environment:production - Filter by environment
- release:1.0.0 - Filter by release version

Combine queries: is:unresolved is:unassigned level:error

organizationSlug.description: The organization slug. If the user passes a parameter in the form name/otherName, it's likely in the format organizationSlug/projectSlugOrId.

projectSlugOrId.description: Filter by project slug or numeric ID (optional). Accepts both project slugs (e.g., 'my-project') and numeric IDs (e.g., '123456').

sort.description: Sort order: date (last seen), freq (frequency), new (first seen), user (user count)

limit.description: Maximum number of issues to return (1-100)
